A2400B_MDCR_STAY_STRT_DT A2400B Start Date of Most Recent Medicare Stay CHAR 8 This column contains the start date of the most recent Medicare stay.
85 A2400C_MDCR_STAY_END_DT A2400C_MDCR_STAY_END_DT A2400C End Date of Most Recent Medicare Stay CHAR 8 This column contains the end date of the most recent Medicare stay.
86 B0100_CMTS_CD B0100_CMTS_CD B0100 Comatose Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies whether or not the resident is comatose. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
87
